---
title: "About This Site"
description: "Additional details about this website."
author: null
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    toc: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

## About This Website

This website was created as a part of my GV300 module (Advanced Quantitative Politics) at the University of Essex.

It serves as a portfolio where I present examples of my data analysis and research work.

This website demonstrates my ability to:

- Analyse data using R  
- Create clear and effective visualisations  
- Communicate statistical results in simple and accessible language  
- Present academic work in a structured and organised manner   

## How This Website Was Built

This website was built using:

- **R Markdown** to combine writing and code in one document  
- **Distill** for creating a clean and professional website layout   
- **Git and GitHub** to manage and track changes  
- **GitHub Pages** to publish the website online  

The goal of this website is to present a clear and professional academic portfolio that demonstrates my skills in quantitative analysis and data communication.
